variables.title: [Ecommerce Ops] Community Discussion
variables.body:
## Ecommerce Ops

An ecommerce operations agent for store management and growth.

Use this thread to:
- Share how you're using this package
- Ask questions and get help
- Suggest improvements
- Report issues

**Install:** `clawhub install ecommerce-ops`

---
*This discussion is part of the [AgentStandard](https://agentstandard.ai) package registry.*
